specific_location: yard at home address of 24247 Hwy 287 (7 miles south from the center of Lamar - 5 miles from the south edge and 1/4 west of Hwy 287)
description: about 4" in length; long curved broad bill; small white patch behind eye; grayish patch on auriculars; green supercillium and crown; bright green back; dark throat to bright blue collar on breast; greenish sides and belly; white undertail coverts; grayish primary coverts; broad notched dark tail with grayish tips in layersBehaviors: typical hummingbird flight - close enough to see it was a hummingbird - but not experienced enough to identify without photosCall: not notedPlumage: bright adult male
